mapper.insert: insert into batch.job_task ( tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, task_type, task_seq, task_status, assigned_worker_code, task_payload, result_summary, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{jobInstanceId}, #{jobPartitionId}, #{taskType}, #{taskSeq}, #{taskStatus}, #{assignedWorkerCode}, #{taskPayload,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: update batch.job_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, result_summary = #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = case when #{taskStatus} in (#{terminalStatus1}, #{terminalStatus2}, #{terminalStatus3}, #{terminalStatus4}) then current_timestamp else finished_at end, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}

update batch.job_task set task_status = #{readyStatus}, assigned_worker_code = null, error_code = null, error_message = null, result_summary = null, started_at = null, finished_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
